message:
feat(refresh-ledger): cross-run regression comparator [coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.24]

ibuuh.24 benchmark/regression slice. The evidence summary shipped in
1ffd8494 + 95961840 lets a single run be inspected; cross-run
comparison is what benchmark CI gates ACTUALLY need ("did this build
regress vs the baseline?"). Adding a structured one-call comparator
means CI / dashboards stop hand-rolling delta math — every consumer
reads the same RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison shape and branches on
the same regression-class signals.

What landed:
- pub struct RefreshPhaseDelta carrying baseline + current
  duration/items/throughput per phase plus duration_delta_pct and
  throughput_delta_pct (both rounded to 2 decimals, both Option<f64>
  with a documented degenerate-case contract).
- pub struct RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison aggregating phase_deltas
  + aggregate_duration_delta_pct + aggregate_throughput_delta_pct +
  dominant_phase_shift (Option<(from, to)>).
- impl RefreshLedgerEvidence::compare_to(&self, baseline) — pure
  O(phases_baseline + phases_current); iterates RefreshPhase::ALL at
  emit time so output is deterministic in canonical pipeline order
  regardless of HashMap iteration.
- Helper pct_delta(baseline, current) codifies the no-NaN /
  no-Infinity safety contract in one place: returns None when
  baseline == 0.0 (no rate of change defined) or when either input
  is non-finite.

Sign convention (matters for benchmark CI parseability):
- duration_delta_pct > 0 ⇒ slower in `current` ("PR added 12% to
  publish duration")
- throughput_delta_pct > 0 ⇒ faster in `current`

Four golden gates pin the contract:
- evidence_compare_to_reports_per_phase_regressions_and_improvements:
  scan 100ms → 200ms (same item count) gives +100% duration / -50%
  throughput. Symmetric improvement case (swap baseline/current) gives
  -50% duration / +100% throughput. Pin the arithmetic + sign.
- evidence_compare_to_surfaces_phases_unique_to_one_side: a phase
  that ran in baseline but disappeared from current must surface
  in the comparison (with -100% duration delta), not be silently
  dropped. This catches the failure mode where a phase elision
  bug would hide regression evidence.
- evidence_compare_to_reports_dominant_phase_shift: pin the (from,
  to) shift signal when dominant phase changes Scan→Persist. Same
  dominant phase ⇒ no shift signal.
- evidence_compare_to_safely_handles_zero_baseline_and_empty_evidence:
  empty/zero-baseline degenerate cases must NOT panic AND MUST NOT
  emit NaN or Infinity in the JSON serialization. Pin the
  defensive None branches directly.

25/25 lib indexer::refresh_ledger tests green via
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p2 cargo test
--lib indexer::refresh_ledger (4 new + 21 pre-existing untouched).

This complements the prior ibuuh.24 slices in this session:
- 1ffd8494 RefreshLedgerEvidence vocabulary (single-run summary)
- 95961840 .lexical-refresh-evidence.json sidecar (per-publish
  artifact)
- this commit RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison (cross-run delta)

Future ibuuh.24 slices wire the comparison into bench/regression
gates (CI step that fails when aggregate_duration_delta_pct exceeds
a threshold) and into the cass status surface (operator preview of
"this rebuild was 12% slower than the last one").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
